name: St. Claude Bridge — Supply Ledger Station
description: A folding table at the center of the bridge deck where the camp's resource inventory is tracked in a waterproof notebook — the physical record of every item received, distributed, and signed for over the past five days.
atmosphericDetails: The notebook's pages are wavy from humidity, the ink slightly smeared on the earliest entries
Father Clement's authorization signatures appear on eleven of the last fourteen supply receipt lines
A separate column headed 'lot number' where the pharmaceutical lot numbers have been logged — the column stops three entries before today's date
